characters.name: Samantha Newly
characters.description: Samantha Newlyis the main character of Samantha Who. A hit-and-run accident leaves Samantha in a coma for eight days; when she wakes up she has retrograde amnesia. As the series progresses, Sam begins to remember bits and pieces of her lost memory but she still needs her friends and family to remind her of key events in her life that she has forgotten. She worked as a Vice President at a Chicago realtor's firm. She quit her job in the episode "The Butterflies".
